rules.rule_text:
title: Turla Group Lateral Movement
id: c601f20d-570a-4cde-a7d6-e17f99cb8e7f
status: test
description: Detects automated lateral movement by Turla group
references:
- https://securelist.com/the-epic-turla-operation/65545/
author: Markus Neis
date: 2017-11-07
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.g0010
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.t1021.002
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1083
- attack.t1135
- detection.emerging-threats
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine:
    - net use \\\\%DomainController%\C$ "P@ssw0rd" *
    - dir c:\\*.doc* /s
    - dir %TEMP%\\*.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: critical
